CSS/SVG 3D Primitive Components (TiltCard v2, Reveal, Scene3D)

nodes.label: Sales and Guest-Count Forecasting (Global QSR Brand)
nodes.norm_label: sales and guest-count forecasting (global qsr brand)

nodes.label: Demographic-Aware Recommender System with Facial Embeddings
nodes.norm_label: demographic-aware recommender system with facial embeddings

nodes.label: CSS/SVG 3D Only (No WebGL)
nodes.rationale: Keeps bundle small and works on any device a hiring manager might use. Real depth via perspective, transform-style preserve-3d, translateZ, layered parallax, and animated SVG.

nodes.label: Modular Split Architecture (Approach A)
nodes.rationale: Each file has one clear purpose and stays under ~200 lines, so it can be read and edited in isolation. Sections, scenes, primitives, decorations, and data each get focused files.

nodes.label: No New Runtime Dependencies
nodes.rationale: No new runtime dependencies; dev deps unchanged; bundle size stays small. Color-mix and other CSS features are browser-native.

nodes.label: Single-Scroll Experience
nodes.rationale: Single-scroll keeps a hiring manager engaged for longer. No routing or multi-page app; the rainbow-spring narrative flows top to bottom.

nodes.label: prefers-reduced-motion Compliance
nodes.rationale: Every animation respects prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — scenes become static, transitions become instant fades. Decorative 3D scenes are aria-hidden.
